claim_model: first-come-first-serve; no fixed assignment; claim lowest wave + highest priority with deps done and locks free
validation_default: CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./...  (== make build vet test)
phase: Wave 1 complete (skeleton wired + core features). Waves 4-5 = production hardening + future-work roadmap.

completed.title: Adapt + promote protocol to root AGENTS.md

tasks.title: Agent-to-agent messaging + create_agent (RFC-0004)
acceptance_criteria: RFC-0004 approved by both CODEOWNERS
ChangeCreateAgent added to contract via joint RFC
a2a routing + approval-gated create_agent with hop-depth + send-quota safety
tasks.human_question: Approve RFC-0004 (a2a posture, who may create_agent, hop/quota limits, contract pin)?
tasks.notes_for_worker: Open issue #20. Touches the frozen contract — joint RFC required before any code. Do not start until RFC-0004 is approved.

tasks.title: Durable / pluggable master-key custody
acceptance_criteria: A pluggable KeySource replaces the ephemeral per-process master key (file-sealed keystore at 0600 + interface for an external KMS)
Session keys survive a control-plane restart
Unit tests cover load/persist/rotate
tasks.notes_for_worker: main.go currently generates the master with crypto/rand each boot (main.go:64). Provide the loader; daemon wiring is T-120. Do not weaken the at-rest sealing.

tasks.title: Structured logging (slog) abstraction
acceptance_criteria: A log/slog-based structured logger (text + JSON option) usable by host and sandbox
No secrets/keys logged; redaction helper
tasks.notes_for_worker: Provide the logger; adoption by other packages is incremental and may be a declared bounded-scope expansion.

tasks.title: Prometheus metrics package
acceptance_criteria: Metric registry + counters/histograms for model calls, gateway approvals, deliveries, sandbox launches/kills
Exposes an http.Handler factory for /metrics
tasks.notes_for_worker: Prefer adding a dependency only with lock:dependency. A stdlib-only expvar-style registry is acceptable to avoid new deps.

tasks.title: API hardening (TLS, rate-limit, body limits, /readyz, /metrics)
acceptance_criteria: Optional TLS (cert/key) option
Token-bucket rate-limit middleware
Request body + header size limits
/readyz readiness endpoint
Mounts an injected metrics handler at /metrics
tasks.notes_for_worker: Keep /healthz unauthenticated. Metrics handler is injected (from T-102) so this task does not depend on T-102 landing first.

tasks.title: OCI resource limits + seccomp profile
acceptance_criteria: memory/CPU/pids cgroup limits added to the OCI spec via SandboxSpec knobs
A restrictive default seccomp profile applied
Tests assert the spec fields
tasks.notes_for_worker: Soft-coordinate on the isolation package (Isolator interface) with T-118/T-110. Own oci.go + a new seccomp.go only.

tasks.title: Host respawn crash-loop backoff
acceptance_criteria: Per-session failure counter + exponential backoff before respawn
Escalates to an alert/needs-human signal after N consecutive failures
Tests
tasks.notes_for_worker: Prevents a misconfigured image from hammering the host.

tasks.title: Sandbox provider backoff + circuit breaker
acceptance_criteria: Exponential backoff with jitter on provider errors
Circuit breaker after a failure streak instead of fixed-interval retry forever
Tests
tasks.notes_for_worker: Today loop retries at a fixed 2s interval (loop.go:146) — thundering herd if the model API is down.

tasks.title: Model proxy: rate caps + audit logging + secret redaction
acceptance_criteria: Per-session/token rate caps on model egress
Request/response audit records
Secret redaction on forwarded responses
Tests
tasks.notes_for_worker: modelproxy.go:12 already flags this as future work.

tasks.title: End-to-end lifecycle integration test
acceptance_criteria: A test drives the full lifecycle inbound -> router -> session launch -> agent loop -> outbound -> delivery using a fake Isolator
An optional runsc-gated variant skipped when runsc is absent
tasks.notes_for_worker: Additive new dir. Use a fake Isolator + fake provider so it runs in CI without runsc.

tasks.title: Slack channel adapter
acceptance_criteria: Adapter implements the channels.Adapter interface for Slack (follow telegram.go)
Token redaction in errors
Tests
tasks.notes_for_worker: Adapter registration in main.go is wired by T-120 (single-owner file) — do not edit main.go here.

tasks.title: Discord channel adapter
acceptance_criteria: Adapter implements the channels.Adapter interface for Discord
Token redaction
Tests
tasks.notes_for_worker: Registration via T-120. Disjoint file from T-109a.

tasks.title: Production deployment: units + installer + sandbox image
acceptance_criteria: Real systemd .service unit + macOS launchd plist
An executable installer (not a comment scaffold)
A sandbox container-image build (Dockerfile + build script) the provisioner can consume
tasks.notes_for_worker: Acquire lock:release. container/** is a new dir for the sandbox image.

tasks.title: Session-state persistence across sandbox restart
acceptance_criteria: Per-session agent state persists in the outbound DB and is restored after a restart
No frozen-contract change (host-internal schema only) — if cross-seam, STOP and file an RFC
tasks.notes_for_worker: Confirm the state schema does not cross the frozen seam; if it does, this becomes lock:contract + agent:needs-human.

tasks.title: Roadmap + docs refresh
acceptance_criteria: README roadmap checkboxes reflect landed work (RFC-0001, rootfs, cross-mount, Telegram)
Future-work lists updated to the Wave 4/5 backlog
tasks.notes_for_worker: Do not edit docs/contract.md (RFC log; contract-adjacent).

tasks.title: Sandbox image signature/digest verification
acceptance_criteria: Provisioner verifies the image digest/signature against a configured trust policy before unpacking rootfs
Tests
tasks.notes_for_worker: Own provisioner.go only; soft-coordinate on the isolation package with T-104/T-110.

tasks.title: Daemon wiring v2: compose the new subsystems
acceptance_criteria: main.go wires the durable key source, metrics handler into the API, structured logger, respawn backoff, model-proxy caps, and registers Slack/Discord adapters
New flags documented
Daemon boots in --dev
tasks.notes_for_worker: Sole owner of cmd/controlplane/main.go. Land after the package tasks it composes.

tasks.title: Kata isolation backend
acceptance_criteria: A Kata implementation of the Isolator interface behind the same hardened spec
Tests (CLI mocked)
tasks.notes_for_worker: Documented future backend. Own kata.go only; soft-coordinate on the Isolator interface.

tasks.title: Egress broker for approved external APIs
acceptance_criteria: A gateway-approved egress broker lets agents reach explicitly-approved external APIs beyond the model host, with an allowlist + audit
Threat-model review sign-off
tasks.human_question: Approve relaxing the network posture: which external destinations, what approval flow, what audit?
tasks.notes_for_worker: Changes the sealed/network=none posture — security-sensitive. Do not start until a human approves the design.

tasks.title: Gateway auto-approval policy + RBAC
acceptance_criteria: A policy engine can auto-approve enumerated low-risk change kinds and scope approvers by role
The AlwaysRequireHuman floor stays the default; policy is opt-in
Threat-model sign-off
tasks.human_question: Which change kinds may auto-approve, and what RBAC roles may approve what?
tasks.notes_for_worker: Relaxes the mandatory-human floor — security-sensitive. Do not start until a human approves the policy.
